Stop Managing Your Tattoo Business
From Your DMs

Tatflow gives tattoo artists one place to handle bookings, clients, quotes, waivers, flash, and payments — so you can focus on the work.

Book a Demo See Features
app.tatflow.ink/board
The Problem
Sound familiar?

Inquiries buried in DMs

You're juggling Instagram, WhatsApp, and email with no central place to track who said what.

No clear booking workflow

The whole process lives in your head — quoting, deposits, booking, reminders. It's exhausting.

Waivers on paper or email

Printed forms, lost signatures, or chasing clients for paperwork the morning of their appointment.

Flash is hard to manage

No clean way to show available designs, track which are claimed, or let clients book them online.

Invoices in a notes app

Deposits, final payments, and receipts scattered across screenshots and notebooks. No real tracking.

The Solution
One platform.
The full client journey.
From the first inquiry to the healed tattoo — Tatflow handles every step so nothing slips through the cracks.

Intake & Booking

Custom intake forms, flash bookings, availability management, and a public studio page clients can find from your Instagram bio.

Client Management

Every client has a full profile — their requests, appointments, completed tattoos, messages, and signed waivers in one place.

Finance & Admin

Auto-generated invoices, deposit tracking, revenue analytics, and digital waivers. Less admin, more tattooing.

Features
Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Public Studio Page

Your own booking page to share on Instagram. Portfolio, flash designs, reviews, pricing, and availability — all in one link.

Bookings & Client Flow

Intake forms, AI brief scoring, quote generation, deposit tracking, and appointment scheduling in one clear pipeline.

Invoices & Revenue Tracking

Auto-generate invoices when sessions complete. Track deposits, payments, and monthly revenue with visual analytics.

Digital Waivers

Create waiver templates and send digital signing links directly to clients. No more paper, no more chasing signatures.

Portfolio & Flash Management

Showcase your completed work and manage flash designs with availability status, pricing, and direct booking links.

Artist & Studio Tools

Multi-artist support, calendar management, performance analytics, and an ROI calculator to understand your business.

Product Tour
See it in action
A look at what your studio looks like inside Tatflow — from your first client request to your last invoice of the month.

Intake Board

Manage every inbound request in a clear pipeline — New Request, Quote Sent, Deposit Paid, Booked. Nothing falls through the cracks.

Client Profiles

Full client CRM with reference images, session history, assigned artists, tattoo records, messages, and invoices all in one profile.

Invoices & Revenue

Track monthly revenue, outstanding balances, and deposits held. Auto-generate invoices and know exactly where your money stands.

Public Studio Page

Your own branded booking page — specialties, flash designs, portfolio, and a direct booking button. Share the link anywhere.

Client Experience
A booking form your clients will actually finish.

When a client clicks your link, they get a clean 3-step form — no clutter, no confusion. You get a structured brief, not a wall of DMs.

1

About You

Name, email, phone, and Instagram handle — everything needed to follow up and send a quote.

2

Your Tattoo

Custom or flash, style, description, placement, size, and preferred appointment date.

3

Reference Images

Upload reference photos and review a full summary before submitting. Clean, complete, no back-and-forth.

Built for growth
Solo first.
Studio ready
when you are.

Most studio software is built for big teams with big budgets. Tatflow starts where you are — one artist, one chair — and grows with you.

Solo Artists

  • One intake link for your Instagram bio
  • Quote and book clients without the back-and-forth
  • Portfolio and flash showcase built in
  • Full revenue tracking from day one

Growing Studios

  • Add multiple artists with individual profiles
  • Assign bookings and track artist performance
  • Studio-wide analytics and revenue view
  • Centralized client management across all artists

Ready to run your studio properly?

Book a demo and we'll walk you through the platform. Setup takes minutes. No credit card required.
